subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と小指に糸をかけて始めます。輪の中に右手を上から入れ、左小指向こう側の糸を取って右手首にかけます
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on the left thumb and little finger. Insert the right hand from above into the loop, pick up the far left–little-finger string, and place it onto the right wrist.

subtitle.ja: 左小指向こう側の糸を右小指で、左親指手前側の糸を右親指でそれぞれ外側から取ります
subtitle.en: With the right little finger, pick down the far left–little-finger string, and with the right thumb, pick down the near left-thumb string, both from the outside.

subtitle.ja: 右小指手前側の糸を左小指で、右親指向こう側の糸を左親指でそれぞれ外側から取ります
subtitle.en: With the left little finger, pick down the near right–little-finger string, and with the left thumb, pick down the far right-thumb string, both from the outside.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指で左手のひらの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With the right index finger, pick up the left-palm string.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指を2~3回転させて輪をねじります
subtitle.en: Twist the right index finger two or three times to twist the loop.

subtitle.ja: 右手首の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release the right-wrist string to show the finished figure.
